macros.token: #if str($image.ext) == 'tif' or str($image.ext) == 'tiff' pages=\$(identify -format '%n\n' 'input.${image.ext}' | head -n 1) && [ "\$pages" -le 1 ] || { echo "Multi-page TIF(F) input is not supported by kraken 7. Detected \$pages pages. Please use PDF input or split it first." >&2; exit 1; } && #end if

param.name: verbose
param.label: Verbosity level
param.help: Increase logging verbosity. 0=default; higher values add one -v flag per level.
